# Dalia's Corner

> Dalia's Corner (Arabic: ركن داليا — "A Little Corner of Love") is a small family business in Egypt that makes handmade, hand-painted pottery planters shaped like cute animal characters. Each piece is shaped from clay and painted by hand by Mama Dalia and her daughters, so no two are alike. Every planter arrives already planted with an easy-care succulent and a care card.

## About
- Brand: Dalia's Corner (Arabic: ركن داليا).
- Tagline: "A Little Corner of Love."
- What it is: a family-run pottery studio in Egypt. Mama Dalia, her daughters, and family shape and hand-paint each piece together.
- Product type: handmade ceramic/pottery planters (plant pots / succulent pots) shaped like animal characters. Fully handmade and hand-painted; every piece is one-of-a-kind.
- Each pot is about 15 cm tall, made of hand-painted clay, and ships pre-planted with a low-maintenance succulent plus a care card explaining how to look after it.

## Characters (products)
- [Bahira](https://daliascorner.com/characters/bahira/) (بهيرة) — a cream duckling-shaped planter with an orange beak, black eyes, and orange webbed feet; the eldest of the three duckling siblings. 650 EGP (originally 800 EGP).
- [ZouZou](https://daliascorner.com/characters/zouzou/) (زوزو) — a cream bunny-shaped planter with tall pink-lined ears, big teal eyes, and pink cheeks; wide-eyed and curious. 650 EGP (originally 780 EGP).
- [Shawkat](https://daliascorner.com/characters/shawkat/) (شوكت) — a terracotta-and-cream fox-shaped planter with pointed ears, a black nose, and whiskers; clever and playful. 600 EGP (originally 740 EGP).
- [Shokreya](https://daliascorner.com/characters/shokreya/) (شكرية) — a mustard-yellow planter with a calm, sleeping face; calm and sweet. 500 EGP (originally 600 EGP).
- [Zaghloul](https://daliascorner.com/characters/zaghloul/) (زغلول) — a planter shaped like a yellow chick hatching from an eggshell; the baby of the three duckling siblings. 650 EGP (originally 850 EGP).
- [Bahgat](https://daliascorner.com/characters/bahgat/) (بهجت) — a bright yellow duckling-shaped planter with an orange beak and webbed feet; the sunny middle duckling sibling. 650 EGP (originally 800 EGP).
- Bahira, Zaghloul and Bahgat are three duckling siblings.

## Shipping & delivery
- Delivery within Cairo, Egypt. Cost and timing depend on the customer's area and are confirmed when the order is placed.
- Each planter is packed with care to arrive safely, already planted.

## How to order
- There is no online payment or checkout. Orders are arranged by direct message.
- On the website you can add characters to a cart and "check out" — this opens a pre-filled WhatsApp (or Instagram) message with the chosen list, and the details and delivery are settled in chat.
- You can also message directly on Instagram (@bydaliascorner) or WhatsApp to order, ask about a custom color/design, or arrange delivery.
- WhatsApp: +20 101 697 9667.

## Privacy
- The cart and the name/phone/address a customer types are stored only in that visitor's own browser. The site is static — there is no server and no database — so nothing is transmitted until the customer sends the message themselves.
- A Meta (Facebook) Pixel is loaded only if the visitor explicitly opts in, and can be switched off again from any page. See [Privacy & tracking](https://daliascorner.com/privacy/).
